name: React Search Component
excerpt: A guide to creating a React search component with filtering and highlighting.

content.text: Learn how to create a search component in React with debounce and highlight functionality.

name: Next.js Blog Search
excerpt: Implement a blog search feature in Next.js using JSON data.

content.text: This tutorial explains how to filter blogs based on user input and display results dynamically.

name: JavaScript Debounce Function
excerpt: Optimize search inputs using a debounce function in JavaScript.

content.text: Debounce helps improve performance by limiting the rate at which a function can fire.
